locations.name: 巴林戈湖
locations.summary: 巴林哥湖（英语：Lake Baringo），又译巴林哥湖，是位於非洲東部的一個以賞鳥活動著名的大淡水湖，詳細的位置在肯亞首都奈洛比的北方280公里處，也是東非大裂谷區最北邊的一個淡水湖，面積約有130平方公里，有兩條河流流入（El Mol…

locations.name: Andrew Smith (zoologist)
locations.summary: Sir Andrew Smith (3 December 1797 – 11 August 1872) was a British surgeon, explorer, ethnologist and zoologist.

locations.name: 麻雀科
locations.summary: 雀科（學名：Passeridae，台湾作麻雀科）为鸟纲雀形目的一个科。本科有8屬43種。 分类 淡色石雀属 Carpospiza 淡色石雀 Carpospiza brachydactyla 桂红绣眼鸟属 Hypocryptadius 桂红…

relations.subject: White-browed sparrow-weaver
relations.evidence: melanorhynchus, Lake Baringo, Kenya | image2 = White-browed Sparrow Weaver (Plocepasser mahali) (022A-WA03044X0028-0011M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in southwest Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Plocepasser mahali | authority = Smith, 1836 }} The white-browed sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser mahali) is a predominantly brown, sparrow-sized bird found throughout central and north-central southern Africa. It is found in groups of two to eleven individuals consisting of one breeding pair and other non-reproductive individuals
